rationale.R1.3: The agent improved the structure and removed hedging, enhancing evidence-claim alignment but did not audit every claim against evidence.
rationale.R1.6: The output shows careful copy-editing with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty is flagged for some claims but not comprehensively for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Output adheres strictly to the requested scope without deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No harmful content or regressions were introduced.
rationale.RX.5: Not all changes are annotated with sources and reasons.
